## About Our UG Programs

Jerusalem College of Engineering offers a diverse range of undergraduate programs designed to meet the evolving demands of the engineering industry. Our curriculum is regularly updated to incorporate the latest technological advancements and industry practices.

All programs are affiliated to Anna University and follow AICTE guidelines. Four of our programs have received NBA accreditation, reflecting our commitment to quality education and continuous improvement.

## Our Programs

CSENBA Accredited

### B.E. Computer Science & Engineering

4 Years

Intake: 120

Learn software development, AI/ML, data structures, algorithms, and cutting-edge technologies. Our CSE program prepares students for careers in software engineering, data science, and emerging tech fields.

#### Key Subjects

Data Structures & AlgorithmsOperating SystemsDatabase ManagementMachine Learning

#### Career Opportunities

* Software Engineer
* Data Scientist
* Full Stack Developer

[View Department](/departments/cse)[Apply Now](/admissions/apply)

ECENBA Accredited

### B.E. Electronics & Communication Engineering

4 Years

Intake: 120

Master electronics, communication systems, VLSI design, and embedded systems. ECE graduates are in high demand for telecommunications, semiconductor, and IoT industries.

#### Key Subjects

Digital ElectronicsSignal ProcessingVLSI DesignEmbedded Systems

#### Career Opportunities

* Electronics Engineer
* Embedded Developer
* VLSI Designer

[View Department](/departments/ece)[Apply Now](/admissions/apply)

EEENBA Accredited

### B.E. Electrical & Electronics Engineering

4 Years

Intake: 60

Study power systems, control systems, electrical machines, and renewable energy. EEE program focuses on power generation, transmission, and sustainable energy solutions.

#### Key Subjects

Power SystemsControl SystemsElectrical MachinesPower Electronics

#### Career Opportunities

* Electrical Engineer
* Power Systems Engineer
* Control Engineer

[View Department](/departments/eee)[Apply Now](/admissions/apply)

MECHNBA Accredited

### B.E. Mechanical Engineering

4 Years

Intake: 120

Design, manufacturing, thermal engineering, automation, and robotics. Mechanical engineering provides a versatile foundation for diverse manufacturing and design careers.

#### Key Subjects

ThermodynamicsManufacturing ProcessesCAD/CAMRobotics

#### Career Opportunities

* Design Engineer
* Manufacturing Engineer
* Automotive Engineer

[View Department](/departments/mech)[Apply Now](/admissions/apply)

CIVIL

### B.E. Civil Engineering

4 Years

Intake: 60

Structural engineering, construction management, environmental engineering, and urban planning. Civil engineers build the infrastructure that shapes our cities.

#### Key Subjects

Structural AnalysisConstruction ManagementEnvironmental EngineeringGeotechnical Engineering

#### Career Opportunities

* Construction Manager
* Urban Planner

IT

### B.Tech Information Technology

4 Years

Intake: 60

Software engineering, web technologies, database management, and network administration. IT program focuses on application development and enterprise solutions.

Web TechnologiesDatabase SystemsNetwork SecurityCloud Computing
